allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''steps:'', len\(d[''steps'']\)\); print\(''time:'', d[''metrics''][''total_time_s'']\); [print\(s[''tool''], s.get\(''error'',''''\)[:80] if s.get\(''error''\) else ''ok''\) for s in d[''steps'']]")
